chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI SCRA 180 of 2025 SCRA 181 of 2025 ___________________________________________________________ DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE(S) ___________________________________________________________ 1. For orders on office objection No.26. 2. For orders on CMA No.2139/2025. 3. For hearing of main case. 4. For orders on CMA No.2140/2025. 28.11.2025 Mr. Khalid Mehmood Rajpar, advocate for the applicant. Under instructions, learned counsel does not press these reference applications, which are hereby dismissed as withdrawn. A copy of this decision may be sent under the seal of this Court and the signature of the Registrar to the learned Customs Appellate Tribunal, as required per section 196 of the Customs Act, 1969. Office is instructed to place copy hereof in the connected file. Judge Judge Khuhro/PS 2025 SCMR 121 whereby it is observed that the matters of classification are to be sent to the Classification Committee
